rootCause: The create process form used a text input width of 85% without global border-box sizing on the form container and inputs. On narrow mobile viewports, input padding and borders increased rendered width beyond the card container, causing horizontal overflow.
resolution: Updated ProcessForm layout styles to enforce width: 100% and box-sizing: border-box on the form container and inputs, removed the overflow-prone 85% text width rule, and added regression tests to enforce bounded form/input sizing across ProcessForm, ItemForm, and QuestForm.
